Proposed acquisition of TargetCo, Inc. by Acme Corp.
Stock-for-stock transaction valued at approximately $500M.
TargetCo is a Delaware corporation with operations in 12 states.
Requires HSR filing and shareholder approval from both entities.
Anticipated closing in Q3 2026.
Legal team: Need partner with M&A experience, two senior associates.
Cross-border elements: TargetCo has subsidiaries in UK and Germany.
